settings.returns_content:
Items must be returned to Logan Brewing, at the expense of the purchaser, within 21 days of the order date.

Head over to returns page to request a form and choose the reason for returning, the order number and photos to receive the return address.
settings.shipping_content:
Most orders are shipped between 1–5 business days after processing.

Domestic shipping is via Australia Post. Estimated delivery times after orders are dispatched 2–10 business days depending on where you call home.
settings.title: Because bloody good beer. deserves bloody good gear.
